text.title: Email Marketing for Solo Operators Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example of Email Marketing for Solo Operators producing a valid email-program artefact, anonymised for portability.

step.name: trigger
step.text: Operator pulled the Email Marketing for Solo Operators methodology to address a recurring task. Applies-If held: precondition checks passed; named owner available; inputs reachable.

step.name: apply-rules
step.text: Walked the rule set against the inputs; rules r1-organic-list-only, r2-welcome-within-5min, r3-segmentation-required passed; rule r4-one-cta-per-email required a small repair before the draft proceeded.

step.name: produce
step.text: Filled the template with the named owner, the input citations, and the per-finding decision; the artefact carried version 1.0.0.

step.name: validate
step.text: Ran scripts/validate-growth-email-marketing.py --file <path>; validator returned 0; the artefact shipped to the downstream consumer.

text.example: Applies-If held → inputs reachable → rules walked → artefact filled → validator returned 0 → owner signed off → downstream consumer registered.
